devdoc.details: - Provides a single-transaction on-chain path for converting SolvBTC   into its underlying Reserve Asset for authorized callers. - Supports two types of whitelisted addresses:   uncapped addresses and capped addresses that share a global rate limit. - Enforces both per-transaction and window-based limits for capped   addresses using a linear-decay rate-limiting model. - For each swap this contract:   - Receives a SolvBTC amount from the caller and burns the tokens.   - Pulls the corresponding Reserve Asset from `currencyVault` using     a pre-configured allowance granted by governance.   - Delivers the Reserve Asset to the caller or a designated recipient     address supplied as `to_`.   - Calculates a configurable swap fee and routes that fee amount to     a dedicated fee recipient address. - The contract does not custody Reserve Assets long term and does not   perform pricing or market making; the conversion result is defined   by the SolvBTC ↔ Reserve Asset relationship. - Governance manages whitelist membership, vault configuration, fee and   rate-limit parameters, and can pause execution in emergencies.

EnforcedPause().details: The operation failed because the contract is paused.

ExpectedPause().details: The operation failed because the contract is not paused.

Initialized(uint64).details: Triggered when the contract has been initialized or reinitialized.

Paused(address).details: Emitted when the pause is triggered by `account`.

Unpaused(address).details: Emitted when the pause is lifted by `account`.

params.currencyVault_: The vault address for paying the underlying reserve asset.
params.currency_: The address of the underlying reserve asset.
params.feeRate_: The fee rate for each swap transaction, charged in terms of the underlying reserve asset.
params.feeRecipient_: The address of the fee recipient.
params.governor_: The address of the governor who is used to set business parameters of this contract.
params.isWhitelistEnabled_: Identify whether the caller should be whitelisted.
params.pauseAdmin_: The address of the pause admin who is used to pause and unpause this contract in emergency.
params.solvBTC_: The address of the SolvBTC token.

paused().details: Returns true if the contract is paused, and false otherwise.

remainingSwapAmount().details: Uses {_amountCanBeSwapped} to apply linear decay to the in-flight      amount based on time elapsed since the last swap.

returns._0: Remaining SolvBTC capacity in the active rate-limit window.

setFeeRate(uint64).details: Restricted to the governor. Delegates to {_setFeeRate}, which      validates that the fee is below 100% and emits {SetFeeRate}.

params.feeRate_: New fee rate expressed in basis points (bps).

setFeeRecipient(address).details: Restricted to the governor. Delegates to {_setFeeRecipient}.

params.feeRecipient_: Address that will receive collected fees.

setMaxSingleSwapAmount(uint256).details: Restricted to the governor. Delegates to {_setMaxSingleSwapAmount}.

params.maxSingleSwapAmount_: New per-transaction swap limit (can be zero).

setMaxWindowSwapAmount(uint256).details: Restricted to the governor. Delegates to {_setMaxWindowSwapAmount},      which checkpoints existing usage and emits {SetMaxWindowSwapAmount}.

params.maxWindowSwapAmount_: New maximum SolvBTC amount that can be swapped in one window.

setWhitelistConfig(address,uint64,bool).details: Restricted to the governor. Delegates to {_setWhitelistConfig}.

params.account_: Address to be whitelisted or updated.
params.expiration_: Timestamp after which the whitelist entry becomes invalid.
params.isRateLimited_: True if the account is subject to the global rate limit.

setWhitelistEnabled(bool).details: Restricted to the governor. Delegates to {_setWhitelistEnabled}.

params.isWhitelistEnabled_: True to enforce whitelist, false to allow all callers.

swap(address,uint256,uint64).details: - If whitelist is enabled, the caller must have a valid, non-expired whitelist entry.   Rate limiting is then applied only to accounts flagged as rate-limited;    when whitelist is disabled, the same limits apply to all callers. - When an entry is rate-limited, this function:   - Enforces a per-transaction cap via `maxSingleSwapAmount`.   - Enforces a rolling-window cap via `maxWindowSwapAmount`,     using linear decay computed by {_amountCanBeSwapped}. - Transfers `solvbtcAmount_` of SolvBTC from the caller, burns it,    and pulls the corresponding amount of reserve currency from `currencyVault`. - Applies the configured fee rate and sends the fee portion to `feeRecipient`,    while the net amount is sent to `to_`. - Emits {SolvBTCSwapped} on success.

params.feeRate_: The fee rate for each swap transaction.
params.solvbtcAmount_: Amount of SolvBTC to swap, denominated in SolvBTC decimals.
params.to_: Recipient address that will receive the reserve currency.

returns.currencyAmount_: Net amount of reserve currency sent to `to_` after fees are deducted.

returns.expiration_: Expiration timestamp of the whitelist entry.
returns.isRateLimited_: True if the account is subject to the global rate limit.

devdoc.title: SolvBTCWhitelistedSwap

DEFAULT_WINDOW().notice: Default duration, in seconds, of the rate-limit window. Used to cap the aggregate swap volume for all capped whitelisted addresses. 86400 seconds corresponds to a 24-hour (1 day) rolling window.

FEE_RATE_BASE().notice: Denominator used when expressing fees in basis points. A fee rate of 10000 represents 100%, 100 represents 1%, etc. Swap fees are calculated as: `fee = amount * feeRate / FEE_RATE_BASE`.

MAX_FEE_RATE().notice: Maximum recommended fee rate, expressed in basis points. A value of 100 corresponds to a 1% upper bound on the swap fee.

currency().notice: Return the address of the underlying reserve currency token.

currencyVault().notice: Return the address of the vault that funds the reserve currency.

feeRate().notice: Return the current swap fee rate in basis points (bps).

feeRecipient().notice: Return the address that receives swap fees.

isWhitelistEnabled().notice: Return whether whitelist checks are currently enforced for swaps.

rateLimit().notice: Return the current global rate-limit configuration and state.

remainingSwapAmount().notice: Return the remaining SolvBTC amount that can be swapped within         the current window for all capped whitelisted addresses.

setFeeRecipient(address).notice: Update the address that receives swap fees.

setMaxSingleSwapAmount(uint256).notice: Update the maximum amount of SolvBTC that can be swapped         in a single transaction.

setMaxWindowSwapAmount(uint256).notice: Update the maximum aggregate swap amount within the default window duration (24h).

setWhitelistConfig(address,uint64,bool).notice: Configure whitelist parameters for a specific account.

setWhitelistEnabled(bool).notice: Enable or disable whitelist checks for swaps.

solvBTC().notice: Return the address of the SolvBTC token used for swaps.

swap(address,uint256,uint64).notice: Swap SolvBTC for the underlying reserve currency.

whitelistConfig(address).notice: Return whitelist configuration for a given account.

userdoc.notice: Execution contract for the SolvBTC Whitelisted Swap model.
